name: Kubernetes Deployment with Helm
description: Create a Helm chart for deploying a Node.js app to Kubernetes. Includes Deployment with resource limits, HorizontalPodAutoscaler, ConfigMap, ExternalSecret (for secrets manager), and Ingress with cert-manager TLS.

steps.description: Set image.repository, resources.requests/limits, autoscaling.enabled, ingress.enabled, replicaCount
Create HPA scaling on CPU (70%) and memory (80%) with min 2 / max 10 replicas
Create ExternalSecret pulling DATABASE_URL and API keys from AWS Secrets Manager
Add liveness/readiness probes, security context (non-root), and rollingUpdate strategy
